headline: FedEx (FDX) Stock Sees Fair Value Moves Lower As Analysts Rework Spin Off Views
summary: FedEx’s updated fair value estimate has shifted from about US$401.89 to roughly US$351.49, resetting the central price target level that many investors watch closely. This move lines up with Street research that now balances confidence in FedEx’s post Freight spin structure and Network 2.0 plan with fresh questions around execution, timing, and where valuation should sit as the story evolves. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets can help you track and interpret the changing...
